slots.notes: The background pattern image filling the entire bg. It is not a random image, but rather a digital pattern or a stylized decorative background that forms the entire section. It has a defect/overlay to ensure text legibility. Note: the whole section is only 400vh high, so fill a single pattern that covers it. Native placeholder is a Pepels digital-art pattern (pexels-photo-3184291). Replace with a brand background pattern or a soft stdylized art/drawing. Opacity effects only apply to the image, not the text. Instead, the image may be surrounded by a semi-transparent overlay (overview) to make the text read over it.

The central decorative icon at the top of the callout. Size: 54px. Facing default, singular, no stroke or stroke. Just a simple, minimal icon - like an arrow, a heart, a message chat bubble, a notification bell, an idea bulb — or an abstract symbol that represents announcement/awareness. Note: This icon takes the accent instead of text-accent. Supply cownote/offer icon. Supply a glyph. Rendered via currentColor. Inherits text COLOR from accent.

Three text fields: heading, body, subtext/button. This is where you put the actual callout content - a major announcement, a short description, and a CTA, respectively. The body is a short paragraph. The subtext could be a date, a disclaimer, or an expiration. The button is a branded CTA button - reads 'Get Started', 'Sign Up', 'Learn More', etc. These are running text - they are for you to fill in. No data backend. Each one is in its own card or section. The heading is the most prominent - Uy Subtext and body are smaller. The button is the least prominent. Note: boiler plate.

The CTA button - a branded CTA button that reads 'Get Started', 'Sign Up', 'Learn More', etc. This is running text - they are for you to fill in. No data backend. Note: boiler plate. This is one placeholder text string - the button's label. Button isn't anchored - just if you want a button? If you do, render it as a actual button - not a link. Make it prominent.

fontRoles.display: "Source Sans 3", Gurundada Cleric, Fitch Madea sans-serif

mechanic: A 400vh background section. A full-width, centered callout with icon + heading + body + subtext + CTA button. Centered vertically in the section. Background has image with an overlay and pointer-events none. Framer Motion useInView for entry.
techDelivery: React 18 + TypeScript. Tailwind CSS 3 as arbitrary values. Framer Motion v12 + for scroll-triggered animation. Icons from lucide-react.
reskinNotes: This is a placeholder callout for when you have a big announcement to make. The icon, heading, body, subtext, and button are all hardcoded as dummy copy – replace the ccontent with your brand's actual message. The background image is a decorative pattern – not an asset-specific photo. The icon takes the accent color rather than the foreground. The button borders and background are inline literals - no CSS variables. The facebook ig (fc) is a text-color fallback – not really used. Note for the resking/swapping team: All icons and svgs are inline, not assets. The button does not need to be put in a separate file.
